/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer.dir/src/vulkan_context.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer.dir/src/multi_gpu_manager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer.dir/src/path_tracer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer.dir/src/scene.cpp.o -o VulkanMultiGPUPathTracer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so
